articles.original_title: Just foolin': Wizards sorry about $10K shot 'skit'
articles.summary: The Wizards have apologized for an April Fools' "skit" in which a planted fan was seemingly tricked into believing he made a half-court shot for $10,000, saying the entire bit was scripted but that they "missed the mark."

articles.title: Trail Blazers fined $100K for early Hansen contact
articles.original_title: Trail Blazers fined $100K for early Hansen contact
articles.summary: The NBA has fined the Trail Blazers $100,000 and suspended assistant GMs Mike Schmitz and Sergi Oliva for two weeks for illegal contact made with Yang Hansen in December 2023, two years before the 7-footer from China was drafted.
